creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #1)
Hi Antoine .. Stupid question somewhat related to this.

By the time mysql57-* phases out so does 12-stable. So there will be no more Tier-1 consumer for i386 ARCH. But despite that how important is build status for i386 ARCH? This is not only for this specific instance but for other i386 only ports too.
